I saw that those who deducted points were also then deducted points in retaliation. I decided my best strategy was not to get involved in this, and to continue to see if we could all maximise our earnings. Eventually it seemed everyone started to contribute, but those who'd been deducting others points and hadn't contributed at the start continued with small retaliatory deductions.
